---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## ✨ Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (Optional)

## 📝 Describe the Solution You'd Like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 💡 Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 🎯 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.

## 🎨 Design/Mockups (if applicable)
Add mockups, wireframes, or design concepts here.

## 📊 Potential Impact
- **Complexity**: Low / Medium / High
- **Priority**: Low / Medium / High
- **User Value**: Low / Medium / High

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I've checked the ROADMAP.md for similar planned features
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goals
- [ ] I can provide more details if needed
